2.title: Foreground CPU
2.query:
timeseries foregroundTotal = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.cpu.foregroundTotal),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(foregroundTotal) desc
| limit 20

| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
